title: What Seeking God First Actually Means (It's Not a Strategy for a Wife)
caption:
What seeking God first actually means. It's not a strategy for a wife.

Reading your Bible with one eye on the payoff. Praying harder the month you're lonelier. That's not seeking him. That's negotiating with him.

Matthew 6:33 says seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and these things will be added to you. Added, not earned. The seeking was always meant to be the whole point, not the fine print before the reward.

A man chasing God first stops screening women for whether they'll finally make him whole. He's already being made whole. He's just looking for someone to walk the road with.

The wife was never the point of the seeking. He was.

#faith #christianmen #manofgod #matthew633 #relationships #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
